name: Nishant Bharihoke
title: Advocate
bio: Nishant is a founder member of VOICE. He is a Computer Sc. professional turned advocate. He has strong understanding of medical terminology. He is a lead prosecutor in Simran's case. Nishant has also authored the book Dr.Death-Simran Chhabra Murder Case, in which he has shared all his experience from investigation to trial.

name: Vishal Sharma
title: Advocate
bio: Vishal is a seasoned advocate usually practicing in the various forums in Chandigarh and Punjab Haryana High Court. He has tremendous experience on constitutional side. He is also leading various battles of medical negligence in High Court.
